title: Yama
author: Aleksandr Ivanovich Kuprin
description:
Credits: Robert Rowe, Charles Franks and the Online Distributed Proofreading Team Of this edition, intended for private circulation only, and printed from type
on Berkeley Antique laid paper, 950 copies have been printed for America, and
550 for Great Britain. Also, 55 unnumbered copies, for the press.
